title: Arrays, Collections, Iterables, and Generators · Behavior Brief: Array Sort
summary: Transform ordered requests, unique identifiers, lookup tables, and streaming batches while preserving ownership and order. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js array sort increment in a collection-processing and streaming pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Sort with a valid comparator, copying policy, stability expectations, and locale-aware text rules.
Use map, filter, reduce, find, some, every, flat, and flatMap from the required output and early-exit behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
